sessionStart.description: Initialize session — create reports directory, generate session ID, check jq dependency

agentStop.description: Finalize session — log session end timestamp

postToolUse.description: Audit trail — log tool usage (keys only, no values) to JSONL

userPromptSubmitted.description: Prompt audit — log anonymized prompt metadata (salted hash, rounded length)

errorOccurred.description: Error tracking — capture error type and context to JSONL
